text:
Created attachment 245682
Patch from <https://github.com/scikit-umfpack/scikit-umfpack/pull/80/files>

Patch from <https://github.com/scikit-umfpack/scikit-umfpack/pull/80/files>.

Also add dependencies on gfortran and cblas.

Remark 1: the tests are still failing, IDK how it can be used.

Remark 2: if you build it from ports and if math/blis is installed, it will prefer blis and won't depend on OpenBLAS!
